model._note: suite model_id. Each precision level uses its own quantized checkpoint.

results_by_concurrency._concurrency_note: client_concurrency is the number of requests sent simultaneously. The inference engine batches internally; this does not directly set engine parameters like max_num_seqs.

meta.benchmark_elapsed_minutes_note: Sum of per-precision benchmark_elapsed_minutes (excludes sleep gaps and orchestrator overhead).

FP8._note: Static per-tensor FP8 (weights + activations). Requires Ampere+ (A100, A800, H20). Skipped automatically on FP16-only hardware.

W8A8._note: INT8 weights + INT8 activations via compressed-tensors. Exercises native int8 tensor cores.

W8A16._note: INT8 weights, FP16 activations. Weight-only quantization — reduces memory bandwidth, not compute dtype.

W4A16._note: INT4 weights, FP16 activations via GPTQ Marlin kernels. Weight-only quantization — larger memory saving than W8A16.
